title: Anthropic vs. Normal Companies: Speed of Innovation Revealed! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof argues that nimble startups like Anthropic outpace established companies by shedding legacy systems and rigid employee structures. The take emphasizes organizational agility as a driver of innovation speed in the AI sector.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof argues that nimble startups such as Anthropic out-innovate larger companies because of organizational agility rather than technical skill. The reasoning points to three factors: faster decision-making, the absence of legacy systems, and flexible organizational structures. The central claim is that speed of innovation is a function of how a company is organized and how it operates, not of raw technical prowess.
